chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.Ps. No.D-938 & D-786 of 2008 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Priority 1. For orders on CMA No.28836 of 2021 2. For orders on CMA No.16358 of 2019 3. For hearing of CMA No.3827 of 2008 4. For regular hearing 29.04.2025 Mr. Jawad Qureshi, Advocate for Appellant Mr. Khurram Rasheed, Advocate for Respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General, Pakistan ************ On 05.09.2023, following order was passed_ “Learned Counsel for Petitioner submits that the Petitions and connected Appeals can be disposed of in light of a judgment rendered by a learned Division Bench of this Court in the matter reported as Mirpurkhas Sugar Mills Limited and others vs. Federation of Pakistan and others 2022 CLD 352. Be that as it may, Mr. Ali Zaidi, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Khurram Rasheed, counsel for the Competition Commission of Pakistan (“CCP”), requests for adjournment on the ground that the latter is engaged before another bench. As such, the matter is adjourned to 21.09.2023 for appearance of counsel for CCP.” Today, none objects for disposal of these petitions. Accordingly, for the reasons so assigned in a case reported as Mirpurkhas Sugar Mills Limited and 17 others versus Federation of Pakistan through Secretary, Ministry of Law & Justice and 2 others (2022 CLD 352), these petitions are dismissed / disposed of along with listed applications. Office to place a copy of this order in connected petition. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
